# Kde-caelestia
This is just my personal custom fork of [ladybug-me/caelestia-dots-kde](https://github.com/ladybug-me/caelestia-dots-kde).

All credit and special thanks go to **ladybug-me**, **0xSolanaceae**, and the original Caelestia contributors for their incredible work!

**Original Caelestia Repository:** [caelestia-dots/caelestia](https://github.com/caelestia-dots/caelestia)
**KDE Port Repository:** [ladybug-me/caelestia-dots-kde](https://github.com/ladybug-me/caelestia-dots-kde)
